findings.title: Trigger fog
findings.message: The description is broad enough to trigger on unrelated help requests.
findings.evidence: The description says the skill 'helps with research' but does not name concrete tasks, boundaries, or near misses.
findings.fix: Rewrite the description around one concrete research job and include an explicit non-goal.

findings.title: Missing output contract
findings.message: Two reasonable agents could produce materially different outputs from the current body.
findings.evidence: The instructions describe gathering information but never define required sections, citations, or stopping conditions.
findings.fix: Add required output sections and one completion check.
